title: China Star Group Celebrates Opening of 60th Location
excerpt: China Star Group marks a major milestone with the grand opening of its 60th restaurant location at the Galleria in Houston, Texas.
content:
China Star Group is proud to announce the grand opening of its 60th restaurant location, situated in the renowned Galleria in Houston, Texas. This milestone represents nearly three decades of growth and dedication to bringing authentic Chinese cuisine to communities across America.

"Reaching 60 locations is a testament to our team's hard work and our customers' loyalty," said the company's CEO. "Houston has been a fantastic market for us, and we're thrilled to bring China Star Buffet to the Galleria."

The new 4,500 square-foot location features our signature 100+ item buffet, a fresh sushi bar, and a Mongolian BBQ station. The grand opening weekend featured live lion dance performances, free samples, and special promotions for early visitors.

China Star Group plans to open an additional 10 locations over the next 18 months, with new openings planned in Arizona, Colorado, and the Carolinas.
author: China Star Group PR Team

title: China Star Buffet Launches Enhanced Sushi Bar Concept
excerpt: Select China Star Buffet locations are rolling out an upgraded sushi bar experience with an expanded menu and live preparation.
content:
China Star Group is elevating the dining experience at select China Star Buffet locations with a brand-new enhanced sushi bar concept. The upgraded sushi bars feature an expanded menu of over 30 sushi and sashimi options, all prepared fresh by our trained sushi chefs.

The new concept includes a live preparation counter where guests can watch as their sushi rolls are made to order. The enhanced menu adds premium options including Rainbow Rolls, specialty Dragon Rolls, and seasonal sashimi plates.

"Our guests love the sushi bar — it's consistently one of the most popular stations at our buffets," said the VP of Culinary Operations. "This upgrade gives them even more variety and a front-row seat to the artistry of sushi making."

The enhanced sushi bar is currently available at 15 locations and will expand to all China Star Buffet restaurants by mid-2026.
author: China Star Group PR Team

title: China Star Group Expands Delivery Reach Through DoorDash and Uber Eats
excerpt: All China Star Group brands are now available for delivery through DoorDash and Uber Eats at participating locations.
content:
China Star Group has completed the nationwide rollout of delivery service through DoorDash and Uber Eats at all participating restaurant locations. Customers can now enjoy their favorite dishes from China Star Buffet, Jade Wok, Lucky Bowl Express, and Golden Dragon Grill delivered straight to their door.

The delivery integration includes curated menus optimized for delivery, special packaging to maintain food quality during transport, and exclusive online-only combo deals.

"Delivery is a critical part of how our customers want to enjoy our food," said the Chief Marketing Officer. "By partnering with DoorDash and Uber Eats, we're meeting our customers where they are and making it easier than ever to order from our brands."

Customers can find their nearest location and order through the delivery partners directly from the China Star Group website.
author: China Star Group PR Team

title: Introducing Golden Dragon Grill: Our Premium Hibachi Concept
excerpt: China Star Group unveils Golden Dragon Grill, a new premium Asian grill concept targeting upscale mall dining.
content:
China Star Group is excited to introduce Golden Dragon Grill, the newest brand in our restaurant portfolio. Golden Dragon Grill brings a premium hibachi-style dining experience to the mall environment, featuring chef-prepared meals cooked on an open grill.

The concept was developed over two years of research and menu testing, drawing inspiration from Japanese teppanyaki and Asian fusion cuisine. The menu features premium proteins including USDA Choice steak, fresh salmon, and jumbo shrimp, paired with house-made sauces and seasonal vegetables.

The first five Golden Dragon Grill locations are now open in select malls across Virginia, Maryland, and Pennsylvania, with plans to expand to 15 locations by the end of 2026.

"Golden Dragon Grill represents the evolution of mall dining," said the Brand Director. "We saw an opportunity to offer a more elevated experience, and the early response from customers has been incredible."
author: China Star Group PR Team

title: China Star Group Hosts Annual Community Food Drive
excerpt: Over 40 China Star Group locations participated in the 2025 Holiday Food Drive, collecting meals for families in need.
content:
China Star Group is proud to share the results of our 2025 Annual Holiday Food Drive, which collected over 25,000 meals for families in need across 20 states. More than 40 of our restaurant locations participated in the drive, partnering with local food banks and community organizations.

Employees and customers alike contributed to the effort, with each participating location serving as a donation drop-off point throughout the month of November. China Star Group matched all donations, doubling the impact of every contribution.

"Giving back to the communities that support our restaurants is at the heart of who we are," said the CEO. "We're incredibly proud of our team and our customers for making this year's food drive our most successful yet."

The Annual Food Drive has been a China Star Group tradition since 2015, and has collectively donated over 150,000 meals to date.
author: China Star Group PR Team

title: China Star Buffet Named 'Best Food Court Restaurant' by Mall Industry Association
excerpt: China Star Buffet receives top honors from the Mall Industry Association for outstanding food quality and customer satisfaction.
content:
China Star Buffet has been awarded 'Best Food Court Restaurant' by the Mall Industry Association (MIA) at their annual National Retail Dining Awards ceremony. The award recognizes China Star Buffet's consistent delivery of high-quality food, excellent customer service, and strong business performance across its network of mall locations.

The MIA evaluated nominees based on customer satisfaction scores, food quality audits, operational excellence, and contribution to mall foot traffic. China Star Buffet scored highest in food variety and customer loyalty.

"This award belongs to every one of our employees who work tirelessly to deliver an exceptional dining experience," said the COO. "From our kitchen staff preparing fresh food daily to our front-of-house team greeting every customer with a smile — this recognition is theirs."

This is the second time China Star Buffet has received this honor, having previously won the award in 2021.
author: China Star Group PR Team
